query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS house_hierarchy (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  parent_house_id INT,
  house_type ENUM('root', 'bloodline', 'mirrored', 'adaptive') DEFAULT 'bloodline',
  trust_name VARCHAR(255),
  trust_protection_level ENUM('calea', 'standard', 'basic') DEFAULT 'standard',
  inter_house_split_percent DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 60.00,
  intra_house_inheritance_percent DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 70.00,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS house_hierarchy (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  parent_house_id INT,
  house_type ENUM('root', 'bloodline', 'mirrored', 'adaptive') DEFAULT 'bloodline',
  trust_name VARCHAR(255),
  trust_protection_level ENUM('calea', 'standard', 'basic') DEFAULT 'standard',
  inter_house_split_percent DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 60.00,
  intra_house_inheritance_percent DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 70.00,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
